scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields (name, type, base, platforms missing but implied, summary, description, containers, resources) and matches gold standard structure well. Minimum viable example is accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: Missing 'platforms' field in both examples (required per gold standard). 'additionalProperties: false' in actions and 'optional: true' in relations are not standard charmcraft.yaml fields — these may be hallucinated or incorrect. 'charm-entrypoint' and 'charm-requirements' under parts are plausible but not verified against gold standard.
